faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers about minute cryptic and how our hints work.

faqItems.question: What is minute cryptic?
faqItems.answer: Minute cryptic is a short daily cryptic clue format designed for quick solving practice.

faqItems.question: How do hints work?
faqItems.answer: Hints are progressive. You reveal one level at a time from broad direction to direct letter help.

faqItems.question: When is the daily clue published?
faqItems.answer: A new clue is published every day.

faqItems.question: Is dailycryptic free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Core gameplay and archive access are free.

faqItems.question: Can I browse old clues?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The archive lists past clues with hints, answers, and explanations.

faqItems.question: What clue types can appear?
faqItems.answer: Common types include anagram, charade, container, reversal, hidden word, and double definition.
